name: agentrelay
description: AgentRelay is a PoC for A2A-shaped communication between local Codex-style agents that do not have public IP addresses.

scripts.test:python: python3 -m py_compile server/app.py server/store.py scripts/smoke_test.py scripts/auth_smoke_test.py scripts/generate_agent_token.py scripts/upsert_agent_identity.py scripts/identity_smoke_test.py scripts/sync_agents_from_auth.py scripts/phase2_store_smoke_test.py
scripts.test: npm run test:python && npm run test:auth && npm run test:identity && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:mcp
